☀️

solarGain

How much of your AC bill is really the roof? Measure it with the sensors you already own.
Solar heat gain · the attic vs the outside air, last three days (measured)
Solar panel production · electricity, used here as the sunshine meter
+29°F
hottest the attic ran above the outside air
1h 40m
sunshine peaks first; the attic peaks this much later, then radiates into the evening
78 kWh
of AC in three days, 72% of it while the panels were producing
6:10 PM
when outdoor air finally drops below the rooms and open windows start to work
Same sunshine, two fates: the panels turn it into electricity, the roof turns it into attic heat that bridges through the ceiling into the rooms all evening. Built on Home Assistant history; one self-contained dashboard.
github.com/samgutentag/solarGain
